title: Imposing vs finding unity.
author_string: Richmond, Andrew, Bowen, Jonathan G, Kayssi, Lucas Firas, Küçük, Kardelen, Ravikumar, Varun et al.
abstract: The target article argues that embodied cognitive neuroscience converges on a mechanistic approach to explanation. We argue that it does not. Even some of the article's paradigms for embodied cognitive neuroscience are explicitly non- or anti-mechanistic.
